model_ir_canonical_json: {"governance":{"auto_create_catalogs":false,"auto_create_schemas":false,"permissions_file":null},"lineage_edges":[],"materialization":{"partition_columns":[],"storage_prefix":"s3://bucket/tgt/raw/fct_order_lines","strategy":"ContentAddressed"},"name":"fct_order_lines","sources":[{"catalog":"tgt","schema":"raw","table":"orders"},{"catalog":"tgt","schema":"raw","table":"customers"},{"catalog":"tgt","schema":"raw","table":"products"}],"sql":"SELECT o.order_id, c.name, p.sku, o.total FROM tgt.raw.orders o JOIN tgt.raw.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN tgt.raw.products p ON o.product_id = p.id","target":{"catalog":"tgt","schema":"raw","table":"fct_order_lines"},"typed_columns":[{"data_type":"Int64","name":"order_id","nullable":false},{"data_type":"String","name":"name","nullable":true},{"data_type":"Float64","name":"total","nullable":true}]}
